repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: 193e1ac4 (ca6k_00045) addresses redefinition of operator class in op_proto.h due to duplicate REG_OP, a common build error for ca6k operators. 84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) addresses TilingFunc error where setter methods are unavailable, a frequent compile-time issue for tiling data. 0e7a3f8b (ca6k_00163) addresses runtime vector core exception (507035) related to double-buffering, relevant if the new operator encounters similar runtime errors. 5014fe8c (ca6k_00266) addresses Shape/StorageShape conversion error in host code, often causing opbuild failures. efab58dd (ca6k_00301) addresses kernel compilation failure due to missing includes, which can occur when kernel source uses specific APIs.
